name: part_001
file: tmp_【3D LIVE CONCERT 生誕ライブ】FUWAMOCO wacha wacha birthday festival 🎂🐾 【#FWMCbday26】 [7M4E3WGWlRM]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_001.webm

scenes.description: FUWAMOCO performs their original song "Lifetime Showtime".
Opening MC section. FUWAMOCO greets the audience and introduces their 3rd birthday festival.

subtitles.original: Bouta burst, fluff & fuzz, we're meant to be free
subtitles.english: Bouta burst, fluff & fuzz, we're meant to be free

subtitles.original: Make a break for it, it's playtime!
subtitles.english: Make a break for it, it's playtime!

subtitles.original: Paws hitting the pavement, dreams sparklin' within our eyes
subtitles.english: Paws hitting the pavement, dreams sparklin' within our eyes

subtitles.english: Gonna keep you smilin', but my sneezes won't stop flyin' by

subtitles.english: Even though we're still just a pair, just a pair of scaredy puppy dogs

subtitles.english: FUWA! MOCO!

subtitles.original: FUWA! MOCO!
subtitles.english: FUWA! MOCO!

subtitles.original: FUWAMOCO BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: FUWAMOCO BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: Wuffians!
subtitles.english: Wuffians!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: Welcome to our FUWAMOCO Wacha Wacha Birthday Festival!
subtitles.english: Welcome to our FUWAMOCO Wacha Wacha Birthday Festival!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for coming to celebrate our birthday with us!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to celebrate our birthday with us!

subtitles.original: 始まりました！
subtitles.english: It's started!

subtitles.original: 今日は生誕ライブに来てくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you for coming to our birthday live today!

subtitles.original: Well, to continue off from yesterday's variety show shenanigans...
subtitles.english: Well, to continue off from yesterday's variety show shenanigans...

subtitles.original: Today, we have a big concert!
subtitles.english: Today, we have a big concert!

subtitles.original: Can you believe it? It's already been three years!
subtitles.english: Can you believe it? It's already been three years!

subtitles.original: Right, our third birthday in hololive English!
subtitles.english: Right, our third birthday in hololive English!

subtitles.original: But Mococo-chan, we can't forget that really important thing, right?
subtitles.english: But Mococo-chan, we can't forget that really important thing, right?

subtitles.original: Introductions!
subtitles.english: Introductions!

subtitles.original: Ah, yeah!
subtitles.english: Ah, yeah!

subtitles.original: I'm not a chihuahua! I'm Fuwawa!
subtitles.english: I'm not a chihuahua! I'm Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: I'm not Fuwawa! I'm Mococo!
subtitles.english: I'm not Fuwawa! I'm Mococo!

subtitles.original: We're hololive English -Advent-'s twin demon guard dog sisters!
subtitles.english: We're hololive English -Advent-'s twin demon guard dog sisters!

subtitles.original: Together we're... FUWAMOCO!
subtitles.english: Together we're... FUWAMOCO!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: And... we have an amazing birthday festival onstage here!
subtitles.english: And... we have an amazing birthday festival onstage here!

subtitles.original: It's so big, Fuwawa!
subtitles.english: It's so big, Fuwawa!

subtitles.original: I know, right?
subtitles.english: I know, right?

subtitles.original: And such a big blue stage too!
subtitles.english: And such a big blue stage too!

subtitles.original: Ah, Fuwawa?
subtitles.english: Ah, Fuwawa?

subtitles.original: Yes?
subtitles.english: Yes?

subtitles.original: Okay, here we go!
subtitles.english: Okay, here we go!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: It's so big and wide too!
subtitles.english: It's so big and wide too!

subtitles.original: Thank you for being such a big hit today!
subtitles.english: Thank you for being such a big hit today!

subtitles.original: But, singing and dancing today is not just going to be us, right?
subtitles.english: But, singing and dancing today is not just going to be us, right?

subtitles.original: No, we're also here with some very special guests too!
subtitles.english: No, we're also here with some very special guests too!

subtitles.original: そう、今日はとっても素敵なゲストさんも来てるから...
subtitles.english: Yes, because some very wonderful guests are also coming today...

subtitles.original: 楽しみにしていてくださいね！
subtitles.english: So please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: そして、もう一人... 謎のゲストさんも...
subtitles.english: And, one more person... a mysterious guest as well...

subtitles.original: 誰かな〜？
subtitles.english: I wonder who it is~?

subtitles.original: BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: BAU BAU!

subtitles.original: But, a birthday wouldn't be complete without this, right?
subtitles.english: But, a birthday wouldn't be complete without this, right?

subtitles.original: Right, something very important.
subtitles.english: Right, something very important.

subtitles.original: I think you know well, but...
subtitles.english: I think you know well, but...

subtitles.original: Hashtag! Yes, the birthday hashtag!
subtitles.english: Hashtag! Yes, the birthday hashtag!

subtitles.original: Right up here, you can see our birthday hashtag.
subtitles.english: Right up here, you can see our birthday hashtag.

subtitles.original: #FWMCbday26, that it is!
subtitles.english: #FWMCbday26, that it is!

subtitles.original: Please, please post your thoughts, take lots of photos, screenshots...
subtitles.english: Please, please post your thoughts, take lots of photos, screenshots...

subtitles.original: ぜひハッシュタグで感想呟いてください。
subtitles.english: Please tweet your thoughts with the hashtag.

subtitles.original: 写真もね！後でポチしに行くからね！
subtitles.english: And photos too! I'll go check them out later!

subtitles.original: We'll check out all your thoughts after the show!
subtitles.english: We'll check out all your thoughts after the show!

subtitles.original: BAU BAU!
subtitles.english: BAU BAU!
